title: Payments to employee before death; effect on payments to dependents
doc_html:
§1236.  Payments to employee before death; effect on payments to dependents

Where payments of compensation have been made to the employee before his death, the compensation for dependents as provided for in this Subpart shall begin on the date of the last of such payments.

Amended by Acts 1970, No. 412, §1; Acts 1975, No. 583, §12, eff. Sept.  1, 1975.
doc_text:
§1236.  Payments to employee before death; effect on payments to dependents
Where payments of compensation have been made to the employee before his death, the compensation for dependents as provided for in this Subpart shall begin on the date of the last of such payments.
Amended by Acts 1970, No. 412, §1; Acts 1975, No. 583, §12, eff. Sept.  1, 1975.
